changes: Improved Rewind reliability so a newly started recording is not lost during cleanup
Fixed BLE audio recording not recovering after the device audio stream dropped mid-session
Fixed the Full Disk Access onboarding step asking to reopen Omi again after every restart
Improved reliability of restoring offline completed tasks
Added isolated local updates for named developer bundles without using the production or beta updater
Fixed a crash that could occur while checking notification permission at startup
Fixed queued Rewind OCR embeddings from the previous account being written into the next account's database after switching accounts
Fixed onboarding sometimes creating a duplicate goal when finishing setup after a transient error
Fixed chat screen-capture screenshots accumulating in your Documents folder without ever being cleaned up
Fixed the task list failing to refresh for users with more than 500 tasks
Fixed undoing the deletion of a task created offline creating a duplicate copy of the task
Fixed undoing a task deletion losing the task's category, tags, recurrence, and completion state
Fixed deleting, completing, or editing a just-created task while offline silently not sticking (the task reappeared on next launch)
Fixed quitting during onboarding's voice demo permanently switching your push-to-talk transcription to Live mode
Fixed WiFi sync hanging on "Connecting…" forever when the device could not be reached
Fixed WiFi audio sync silently dropping audio after the first partial packet by tracking block boundaries across the whole stream
Fixed a failed WiFi sync leaving a phantom entry in the pending-sync count that never cleared
Fixed pressing Stop during a WiFi sync briefly showing an error message even though you cancelled it on purpose
Fixed the Stop button during WiFi sync not actually cancelling the in-progress transfer
